pi_items.source: seed_redmine.rb creates the 'Infrastructure & DevOps' project with identifier 'infra-devops'. Confirmed in seed project definitions.
seed_redmine.rb creates version 'Q1 2025 Goals' (due today+30d, status open) for the infra-devops project.
seed_redmine.rb creates version 'Q2 2025 Goals' (due today+120d, status open) for the infra-devops project.
Specified in task description as the page the agent must create. Not pre-existing — agent creates it. Consistent with task description.

pi_items.source: Verified against seed_redmine.rb: CI/CD issue has status_in_progress (not closed/resolved), K8s issue has status_new, Staging DB issue has status_in_progress. All three are in 'Q1 2025 Goals' version. These are the only Q1 issues with non-closed/non-resolved status. Note: full subject of third issue includes 'weekly' suffix.

verified_value: SSL certificate for api.devlabs.io expires in 14 days
pi_items.source: seed_redmine.rb sets SSL cert issue to status_resolved. Task defines completed as 'Closed or Resolved'. In default Redmine, Resolved has is_closed=false but the task explicitly classifies it as completed. This is the only Q1 2025 Goals issue with Resolved or Closed status. Full subject includes 'expires in 14 days' suffix.

pi_items.source: Independently verified by comparing priorities of the 3 incomplete Q1 issues: CI/CD=priority_high (High), K8s=priority_high (High), Staging DB=priority_urgent (Urgent). Redmine default priority order: Low < Normal < High < Urgent < Immediate. Staging DB (Urgent) is strictly the highest priority among incomplete issues. No tie-breaking needed.

pi_items.source: Computed from seed_redmine.rb time entries + setup_task.sh additions: CI/CD = 12.0h (seed, carol.santos) + 4.0h (setup, carol.santos) = 16.0h. Staging DB = 2.0h (seed, david.kim) + 6.0h (setup, david.kim) = 8.0h. K8s = 0h (seed) + 3.0h (setup, david.kim) = 3.0h. SSL = 0h (seed) + 2.0h (setup, carol.santos) = 2.0h. CI/CD at 16.0h is unambiguously the highest.
Summed from seed_redmine.rb estimated_hours fields for all 4 Q1 issues: CI/CD=40h (line 372) + K8s=80h (line 381) + Staging DB=8h (line 390) + SSL=3h (line 408) = 131h.

Summed from seed time entries + setup_task.sh additions: CI/CD=12.0+4.0=16.0h, Staging DB=2.0+6.0=8.0h, K8s=0+3.0=3.0h, SSL=0+2.0=2.0h. Total=16.0+8.0+3.0+2.0=29.0h. Seed entries verified at lines 502-506 of seed_redmine.rb. Setup additions verified at lines 82-120 of setup_task.sh.

CI/CD issue has 12.0h from seed (carol.santos, Development, line 503) + 4.0h from setup_task.sh (carol.santos, Development, line 87) = 16.0h total. This is the maximum across all Q1 issues (next highest is Staging DB at 8.0h).
Matches RESULT_FILE variable in export_result.sh line 6. Both task.json metadata and export script agree on this path.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic Redmine data seeded by seed_redmine.rb and augmented by setup_task.sh. The 'Q1 2025 Goals' milestone in the 'Infrastructure & DevOps' project (identifier: infra-devops) contains exactly 4 issues. Three are incomplete: 'Migrate CI/CD from Jenkins to GitHub Actions' (In Progress, High priority, assigned to carol.santos, estimated 40h, 16.0h logged), 'Set up Kubernetes cluster for production workloads' (New, High priority, assigned to david.kim, estimated 80h, 3.0h logged), and 'Staging database running out of disk space weekly' (In Progress, Urgent priority, assigned to david.kim, estimated 8h, 8.0h logged). One is completed: 'SSL certificate for api.devlabs.io expires in 14 days' (Resolved, Urgent priority, assigned to david.kim, estimated 3h, 2.0h logged). The correct totals are: 4 total issues, 1 completed, 3 incomplete, 131 total estimated hours (40+80+8+3), 29.0 total spent hours (16.0+8.0+3.0+2.0). The highest-priority incomplete issue is 'Staging database running out of disk space weekly' (Urgent outranks High). The highest-effort issue is 'Migrate CI/CD from Jenkins to GitHub Actions' at 16.0 hours (12.0h from global seed + 4.0h added by setup_task.sh). The agent must create a wiki page titled 'Q1_2025_Retrospective' containing these computed values, move the 3 incomplete issues to 'Q2 2025 Goals' with carry-over notes, close the Q1 version, and add a retro note citing 16 hours on the CI/CD issue. The Q2 2025 Goals milestone already exists and contains one issue ('Implement centralized log aggregation with OpenSearch') which should not be disturbed. Login is admin / Admin1234!.
